title: Saturday's League One playoff predictions and previews including Bolton vs. Bradford, Stevenage vs. Stockport
text: Sports Mole provides playoff predictions for two League One first-leg matches scheduled for Saturday at 3pm. Stevenage vs. Stockport County — The publication predicts a 1-0 victory for Stevenage. The analysis highlights that Stevenage has lost just twice across 23 home league matches this season, suggesting the hosts should leverage their strong home record. The article notes the match could lead to a cagey affair in Hertfordshire, with Stockport potentially accepting a narrow defeat ahead of the second leg at Edgeley Park. Bolton Wanderers vs Bradford City — Sports Mole forecasts a 1-0 win for Bolton. The preview anticipates a low-scoring affair at the weekend, characterizing playoff first legs as typically tight and cagey given the stakes for both teams. Bolton's predicted victory would provide them a slender advantage heading into Bradford's home match. Article written by Carter White.
